nodes.name: Mimic honeyeater
nodes.summary: The mimic honeyeater (Meliphaga analoga) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is widely spread throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical mangrove forests, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The mimic honeyeater (Meliphaga analoga) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is widely spread throughout New Guinea.

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。
